contracts.profileVisibility: Field disclosure follows the visibility matrix (Q06): owners read own gamer_profiles and disclosure_settings; non-owners are denied cross-account profile reads and writes.
contracts.groupBlockBehavior: Co-member blocks follow the group-block-behavior matrix (Q12): block rows sync enforcement keys; accounts_blocked gates connection requests; blocked pairs cannot read play invitations; group messaging respects membership and block state.
contracts.identityWrites: Profile identity split-write per D11: authenticated users write own gamer_profiles; service role handles provisioning triggers and cross-account admin reads.
